project.name: autoresearch
project.description: An autonomous AI research agent framework that runs overnight experiments on a single-GPU LLM training setup, modifying code, training for short intervals, evaluating results, and iterating automatically. Based on a simplified implementation of nanochat, the system is directed by Markdown program files rather than direct Python edits.

nodes.name: prepare.py
nodes.summary: Data preparation and runtime utilities for the autoresearch project. Downloads parquet data shards from HuggingFace, trains a BPE tokenizer using rustbpe/tiktoken, and provides a Tokenizer wrapper class, a best-fit-packing dataloader, and a bits-per-byte evaluation function consumed by the training scripts.

nodes.name: train_nanochat.py
nodes.summary: Single-GPU GPT pretraining script derived from nanochat. Defines a GPT architecture with causal self-attention (sliding window + flash attention 3), value embeddings (ResFormer), rotary position embeddings, and a MuonAdamW hybrid optimizer. Runs a time-budgeted training loop with warmup/warmdown LR schedules, gradient accumulation, and BPB evaluation.

nodes.name: train_t5.py
nodes.summary: Single-GPU GPT pretraining script, nearly identical to train_nanochat.py. Contains the same GPT architecture, MuonAdamW optimizer, and time-budgeted training loop. Appears to be a variant or fork used for a separate experiment.

nodes.name: Tokenizer
nodes.summary: Minimal tokenizer wrapper around a tiktoken Encoding object. Provides encode/decode with optional BOS prepend, batch encoding via encode_ordinary_batch, and class-method factory to load from a pre-trained pickle on disk.

nodes.name: download_single_shard
nodes.summary: Downloads a single parquet shard from HuggingFace with exponential-backoff retry logic (up to 5 attempts), streaming to a temp file before atomic rename.

nodes.name: download_data
nodes.summary: Orchestrates parallel download of training shards plus a pinned validation shard using a multiprocessing Pool, skipping already-downloaded files.

nodes.name: train_tokenizer
nodes.summary: Trains a BPE tokenizer from parquet text data using rustbpe, wraps the result in a tiktoken Encoding, saves it as a pickle, and builds a token-to-byte-length lookup tensor for BPB evaluation.

nodes.name: text_iterator
nodes.summary: Generator that yields text documents from training-split parquet files (excluding the pinned validation shard), capping per-document length and total character budget.

nodes.name: make_dataloader
nodes.summary: BOS-aligned infinite dataloader with best-fit document packing. Uses pre-allocated pinned CPU and GPU buffers for async transfer, achieving 100% token utilization with no padding by cropping the shortest document to fill remaining row capacity.

nodes.name: evaluate_bpb
nodes.summary: Computes bits-per-byte (BPB) on the validation set as the fixed evaluation metric. Sums per-token cross-entropy weighted by UTF-8 byte lengths, excluding special tokens, then converts nats to bits.

nodes.name: GPTConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding GPT model hyperparameters: sequence length, vocab size, layer count, head counts (including GQA via n_kv_head), embedding dimension, and sliding window pattern string.

nodes.name: CausalSelfAttention
nodes.summary: Causal self-attention module with grouped query attention support, rotary embeddings, QK-norm, flash attention 3 backend, and optional value embedding residual (ResFormer) gated by a learned per-head input-dependent gate.

nodes.name: MLP
nodes.summary: Two-layer MLP with ReluSquared activation (relu followed by squaring) and 4x hidden expansion, used as the feedforward block in each transformer layer.

nodes.name: Block
nodes.summary: Single transformer block composing CausalSelfAttention and MLP with pre-norm (RMS norm) residual connections and value embedding pass-through.

nodes.name: GPT
nodes.summary: Full GPT language model with token and value embeddings, learnable per-layer residual and x0 scaling lambdas, rotary position embeddings, sliding window attention patterns, logit soft-capping, and integrated optimizer setup (MuonAdamW with per-parameter-group LR scaling).

nodes.name: MuonAdamW
nodes.summary: Hybrid optimizer combining Muon (polar express orthogonalization with Nesterov momentum and NorMuon variance reduction) for 2D matrix parameters and AdamW for all other parameters. Uses 0-D CPU tensors to avoid torch.compile recompilation.

nodes.name: adamw_step_fused
nodes.summary: Torch-compiled fused AdamW parameter update: weight decay, first/second moment EMA updates, bias correction, and parameter step in a single compiled graph.

nodes.name: muon_step_fused
nodes.summary: Torch-compiled fused Muon optimizer step implementing Nesterov momentum, polar express orthogonalization (iterative Newton-Schulz), NorMuon variance reduction with second-moment tracking, and cautious weight decay with gradient-aligned masking.

nodes.name: GPTConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding GPT model hyperparameters (identical to train_nanochat.py variant): sequence length, vocab size, layer count, head counts, embedding dimension, and sliding window pattern.

nodes.name: CausalSelfAttention
nodes.summary: Causal self-attention with GQA, rotary embeddings, QK-norm, flash attention 3, and optional value embedding residual gating (identical to train_nanochat.py).

nodes.name: GPT
nodes.summary: Full GPT language model with value embeddings, per-layer residual lambdas, rotary embeddings, sliding window attention, logit soft-capping, and MuonAdamW optimizer setup (identical to train_nanochat.py).

nodes.name: MuonAdamW
nodes.summary: Hybrid Muon + AdamW optimizer (identical to train_nanochat.py variant), using polar express orthogonalization for matrix params and standard AdamW for embeddings and scalars.

nodes.name: muon_step_fused
nodes.summary: Torch-compiled fused Muon optimizer step with Nesterov momentum, polar express orthogonalization, NorMuon variance reduction, and cautious weight decay (identical to train_nanochat.py).

nodes.name: adamw_step_fused
nodes.summary: Torch-compiled fused AdamW update step (identical to train_nanochat.py).

metadata.label: imports MAX_SEQ_LEN, TIME_BUDGET, Tokenizer, make_dataloader, evaluate_bpb
imports MAX_SEQ_LEN, TIME_BUDGET, Tokenizer, make_dataloader, evaluate_bpb
Nearly identical training scripts (same model, optimizer, and training loop)

layers.name: Data Pipeline & Utilities
layers.description: Foundational data preparation, BPE tokenizer training, best-fit-packing dataloader, and BPB evaluation utilities shared by all training experiment scripts.

layers.name: Nanochat Training Experiment
layers.description: Primary single-GPU GPT pretraining script defining the transformer model architecture, MuonAdamW hybrid optimizer, and time-budgeted training loop.

layers.name: T5 Variant Training Experiment
layers.description: Forked GPT pretraining script with identical model architecture and optimizer for running independent experimental variations in parallel.

tour.title: Training Entry Point
tour.description: Start with train_nanochat.py, the main training script and highest fan-out node in the project. This single file orchestrates the entire training pipeline: it defines the GPT model architecture, sets up the custom MuonAdamW optimizer, imports data utilities from prepare.py, and runs a time-budgeted training loop on a single GPU.

tour.title: Data Preparation Foundation
tour.description: The prepare.py module is the most-imported file in the project and forms the foundational Data Pipeline layer. It handles everything upstream of model training: downloading parquet shards in parallel, training a BPE tokenizer, wrapping it for runtime use, building an efficient dataloader, and computing evaluation metrics.

tour.title: Data Download and Tokenization
tour.description: Before any training can begin, data must be fetched and tokenized. The download_data function orchestrates parallel shard downloads, while train_tokenizer trains a BPE tokenizer on that data, and the Tokenizer class provides a minimal runtime wrapper around the resulting tiktoken Encoding.

tour.title: Dataloader and Evaluation
tour.description: make_dataloader creates a BOS-aligned infinite dataloader that uses best-fit packing to efficiently fill each batch with variable-length sequences. evaluate_bpb computes bits-per-byte, the project's primary evaluation metric. Both are the critical interface between the data pipeline and the training loop.

tour.title: GPT Model Architecture
tour.description: The GPT class defines the complete transformer model with value embeddings, rotary position embeddings (RoPE), and sliding window attention. This is the core neural network that the training loop optimizes.

tour.title: Attention Mechanism
tour.description: CausalSelfAttention combines flash attention 3 for memory-efficient computation, grouped-query attention (GQA), rotary embeddings, and a value embedding residual. This is the most compute-intensive component.

tour.title: Custom Optimizer
tour.description: MuonAdamW applies the Muon update rule (polar express orthogonalization) to matrix parameters and standard AdamW to others, using fused CUDA kernels. muon_step_fused implements the core Newton-Schulz iteration for approximate polar decomposition.

tour.title: Variant Training Script
tour.description: train_t5.py is a nearly identical variant of train_nanochat.py representing a parallel experiment track. Multiple training scripts reflect the project's core purpose: an autonomous research agent that evaluates different configurations overnight.
